com.tonic.jaloc.impl.fixedqueues

Class PCharFixedQueue

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<A,W>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing<A,W>
        • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractPrimitiveFixedQueue<PCharArray,PCharWriter>
          • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.fixedqueues.PCharFixedQueue
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PCharFixedQueue
extends AbstractPrimitiveFixedQueue<PCharArray,PCharWriter>
    A fixed-capacity native char FIFO queue that rejects when full.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PCharFixedQueue(long capacity)
      Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the system allocator.
      PCharFixedQueue(NativeAllocator allocator, long capacity)
      Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the given allocator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      char dequeue()
      Removes and returns the head element.
      void enqueue(char value)
      Enqueues value at the tail.
      void enqueueAll(char... values)
      Enqueues values left to right, all or nothing.
      boolean offer(char value)
      Enqueues value at the tail if room remains.
      char peek()
      Reads the head element without removing it.

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeRing

        clear

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection

        capacity, close, isEmpty, isOpen, size

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PCharFixedQueue

        public PCharFixedQueue(long capacity)
        Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the system allocator.
        Parameters:
        capacity - the fixed capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if capacity is not positive

      • PCharFixedQueue

        public PCharFixedQueue(NativeAllocator allocator,
                       long capacity)
        Allocates a queue of the given capacity on the given allocator.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        capacity - the fixed capacity
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if capacity is not positive

    • Method Detail

      • enqueue

        public void enqueue(char value)
        Enqueues value at the tail.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to enqueue
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if full or closed

      • offer

        public boolean offer(char value)
        Enqueues value at the tail if room remains.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to enqueue
        Returns:
        true if accepted, false if full
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • enqueueAll

        public void enqueueAll(char... values)
        Enqueues values left to right, all or nothing.
        Parameters:
        values - the values to enqueue
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if values is null
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if the values do not all fit, or if closed

      • dequeue

        public char dequeue()
        Removes and returns the head element.
        Returns:
        the removed element
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • peek

        public char peek()
        Reads the head element without removing it.
        Returns:
        the head element
        Throws:
        java.util.NoSuchElementException - if empty
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
